description: Perform a Near Duplicate Content audit on 'https://crawler-test.com/' using a 90% similarity threshold. Ensure crawl analysis is performed to calculate near duplicates. Export the near duplicates results to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/near_duplicates.csv' and create a text report at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/similarity_analysis.txt' documenting the number of duplicate groups found and the highest similarity percentage observed.
